leadText: Nuvema Town (Japanese: カノコタウン Kanoko Town) is a small town located in southeastern Unova. It is the hometown of the player in Pokémon Black and White. It is also the hometown of Cheren and Bianca—the rivals of the player in Pokémon Black and White, and the Gym Leader of the Aspertia Gym and Professor Juniper's assistant, respectively, in Pokémon Black 2 and White 2. The Juniper Pokémon Lab, where Professor Juniper is based, is located in the town. The town has only one exit; to the north is Route 1, leading to Accumula Town. In Pokémon Black and White, after Alder has been defeated, Bianca can be found in the town on weekends, challenging the player to a rematch once a day.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon Black and White , when the player first exits their house, a group of Pidove Day / Woobat Night can be seen flying away. Professor Juniper 's lab features the same type of wind turbine that appears in New Bark Town in Pokémon HeartGold and SoulSilver . Nuvema Town and Aspertia City are the only player hometowns that share a region . In Pokémon Black 2 and White 2 , if the player has not used Memory Link and reads the sign of Hilbert / Hilda 's house, it will read, "...'s House".
